(a) The department may enter into an interlocal contract with one or more local governments in accordance with Chapter 791 (Interlocal Cooperation Contracts) , Government Code.

(b) The department by rule shall adopt policies and procedures consistent with applicable state procurement practices for soliciting and awarding the contracts under this section.
markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 6
### Chapter 201. Gen. Provisions & Admin.
##### § 201.209 — Authority to Contract

(a) The department may enter into an interlocal contract with one or more local governments in accordance with Chapter 791 (Interlocal Cooperation Contracts) , Government Code.

(b) The department by rule shall adopt policies and procedures consistent with applicable state procurement practices for soliciting and awarding the contracts under this section.

*Added by Acts 2001, 77th Leg., ch. 869, Sec. 1, eff. June 14, 2001.*
